raw.subject: Your Killeen page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed that Pull-Up Roadside's posts on Facebook often stress the importance of car maintenance, and it's clear that you're passionate about helping people stay safe on the road.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, and for a reliable roadside service like yours, having a website can be a big missed opportunity to connect with customers and book jobs online.

I sketched out a homepage idea inspired by your Facebook photos and posts. It includes a prominent emergency call-to-action, a list of your services, a map of your service area, and a sticky phone bar with your number. You can see it here:
https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/pull-up-roadside-killeen

If you'd like to get started with a website that supports your business, I'd love to discuss how a simple, flat fee project can get you online quickly.
Reply to this email or give me a quick call to explore further.
